title: Klarna Assigned Investment Grade Credit Rating by S&P Global.
full_text:
Stockholm, 27 April 2023 – Klarna, a leading global retail bank, payments, and shopping service is pleased to announce it has been assigned an investment grade credit rating by S&P Global. 

S&P Global assigned Klarna a credit rating of BBB-/A-3 with a stable outlook. This reflects Klarna's ‘ability to defend its robust e-commerce position in its key markets, rebuild profitability’ and ‘maintain a strong capital buffer’ according to S&P Global’s research update.
